'''Jerf Huxley''' was a heavyset [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked as a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] and was once part of [[Talon Karrde]]'s organization, and did not take kindly to being cut off from it in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]. [[Bats]], [[Fisk]], and [[Sinker (smuggler)|Sinker]] were some of his enforcers, known as [[Huxlings]], and he had a [[Droideka/Legends|droideka]]. He would later confront [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] in order to collect a severance fee from Karrde. Setting his droideka after her, Huxley was surprised as Jade and her husband, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], destroyed the droid and let him escape with his life.

==Appearances==
